tweets.full_text:
The strongest models are gated and access is granted only to a select few.

Hermes Agent now exposes MoA presets as virtual models, giving you capabilities beyond the publicly available frontier: 8% higher than Opus 4.8 and 11% higher than GPT 5.5 on our upcoming benchmark. https://t.co/0ahSXvFgQK

additional_media_info.title: MoA in Hermes Agent: Capabilities beyond the available frontier

tweets.summary: Nous Research推出Hermes Agent，通过MoA预设虚拟模型，性能超越Opus和GPT 5.5各8-11%，突破闭源模型垄断。
angles: 开源模型反超闭源：Hermes Agent性能超越GPT和Opus

tweets.full_text:
Forget lidar.
One single camera.
Runs in real time & is open source:

A streaming 3D model that reconstructs scenes live, at ~20 FPS, over long sequences.

End-to-end. 

Optimization tricks, cleanup steps?

Nope.

And it beats both streaming and even some offline methods. https://t.co/l5LrN2taIu
tweets.summary: 单摄像头实时3D场景重建，开源方案，20FPS流式处理，性能超越离线方法。无需激光雷达的前沿视觉技术突破。
angles: 一个摄像头实时3D重建，开源击败激光雷达方案
20FPS流式3D场景重建，无需优化的黑科技

tweets.full_text:
Talked with a few folks inside of AI labs (OpenAI, Anthropic) about what they think of the future of software engineering.

The “closer” to shipping production code engineers are, the less they believe software engineering will be “solved” fully by AI. The opposite true as well
tweets.summary: Gergely Orosz采访OpenAI、Anthropic内部人士，发现越接近生产代码的工程师越不相信AI会完全解决软件工程问题。这反映了AI在实际工程中的局限性与认知差异。
viral_signals: 有人物/团队故事（Gergely Orosz + OpenAI/Anthropic内部人士）
反常识/意外性（工程师距离生产代码越近，对AI解决方案的信心反而越低）

tweets.full_text:
stop telling Claude Code/Codex "read this file".
stop telling Claude Code/Codex "now read that one too".
stop telling Claude Code/Codex "grep the whole repo".

install codebase-memory. it indexes the Linux kernel, 28M lines, in 𝟯 𝗺𝗶𝗻𝘂𝘁𝗲𝘀. your repo takes seconds.

index https://t.co/KXqTod5NEu
tweets.summary: codebase-memory工具3分钟索引Linux内核2800万行代码，秒级处理用户仓库。解决Claude Code逐文件读取低效问题的开发者工具。
angles: 3分钟索引2800万行代码，Claude Code加速神器
告别逐文件读取，codebase-memory秒级处理整仓库
开发者必装：Linux内核级代码索引工具
